entity.description: Knowing Jehovah. The chief of one of the courses of the priests (1 Chr. 24:7).

nodes.label: Jedaiah
nodes.description: Knowing Jehovah. The chief of one of the courses of the priests (1 Chr. 24:7).

verses.text: Now the first lot came forth to Jehoiarib, the second to Jedaiah,
The priests: the children of Jedaiah, of the house of Jeshua, nine hundred seventy and three.
